title: Post misrepresents vote on census citizenship question | Fact check
shortDescription: The Democratic vote in question wasn't to add representation for non-U.S. citizens, it was to continue following the 14th Amendment.

title: Trump tells sweltering rally in Las Vegas he won't tax tips
shortDescription: Meanwhile, Trump did not endorse any of Nevada's Republican candidates for U.S. Senate but did say he'd rather be electrocuted than eaten by a shark.

title: Donald Trump and Joe Biden are nearly tied nationally, in battleground states
shortDescription: The poll, released by CBS News and YouGov, shows 49% of voters across the country would likely support Biden at this point in the election, and 50% would vote for Trump.

title: Gretchen Whitmer hits Kristi Noem, other GOP officials over contraception bill
shortDescription: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer, a Democrat, called the GOP response to last week's failed contraception access bill 'disingenuous at best.'

title: Joe Biden visits World War I cemetery in France that Donald Trump skipped
shortDescription: Biden ends five-day trip to France with visit to a World War I cemetery. Trump canceled a trip to the burial ground in 2018.

title: Biden honored with state visit in France amid tensions over wars
shortDescription: In Paris, President Joe Biden and French President Emmanuel Macron stress solidarity amid tensions over trade issues, wars in Ukraine and Gaza

title: Biden, Macron welcome rescue of four hostages in Gaza
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and French President Emmanuel Macron laud Israel's rescue of four hostages held by Hamas.

title: Donald Trump now backs mail-in voting - as GOP lawyers try to curb it
shortDescription: Mail-in balloting is part of a new Republican plan to promote early voting, even after years of Trump attacks on the idea.

title: 'So many things wrong with this:' Trump admin vet on Russia prisoner claim
shortDescription: Donald Trump's own former advisors say he undermined national security by claiming Vladimir Putin would release Evan Gershkovich if Trump wins

title: Video shows Biden had chair to sit in at D-Day ceremony | Fact check
shortDescription: A video from a D-Day ceremony in France was edited to make it appear Biden was trying to sit without a chair behind him.

title: Trump judge flags social media post from supposed juror's cousin
shortDescription: The judge, Juan Merchan, flags a post to court's Facebook page purportedly from May 29, two days before jury verdict convicting former president

title: After week of Hunter Biden trial testimony, what's next for the case?
shortDescription: Prosecutors rested their felony gun case against the president's son as the defense called Naomi Biden to the witness stand.

title: Who is Neilia Biden? Hunter Biden's mother was 'the brains' behind Joe
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's mother, Neilia Hunter Biden, died in a car crash in 1972 at age 30. Here is the role she played in the Biden family.

title: Virginia GOP governor doubles down on 2024 swing-state aspirations
shortDescription: The Trump campaign has yet to invest heavily in Virginia but money, manpower and energy are coming soon to Virginia, GOP Chair Rich Anderson said.

title: After D-Day events in France, Biden turns gaze to wars in Ukraine and Gaza
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is facing a steep climb as he turns his attention from D-Day commemorations to conflicts in Gaza and Ukraine at the G7 Summit.

title: Down-ballot races to watch: State Supreme Court seats
shortDescription: State Supreme Court elections may not be at the top of your ticket this November, but they could influence important policy going forward.

title: Appeals panel for Donald Trump's case not yet determined | Fact check
shortDescription: The Black women seen in a viral photo are among 21 justices at a New York appellate court. If Trump appeals, any of those 21 could hear his case.

title: Joe Biden said he won't pardon son if he is convicted in gun trial
shortDescription: President Joe Biden reiterated his stance in a new interview Thursday that he would not pardon his son if he is convicted in his felony gun trial.
